invariants_acknowledged: Reusable @intelliflow/ui component built on Tiptap v3 (StarterKit + Image); StarterKit v3 bundles Link so no separate extension-link dep.
All required capabilities present: headings (H1-H3), bold, italic, bullet & numbered lists, links, images, code blocks (+ undo/redo).
Structured output via pure extractSections() (heading-split sections); emitted by onSectionsChange. Toolbar reactive via useEditorState (Tiptap v3 no longer re-renders per transaction).
Material Symbols Outlined icons only (no lucide/heroicons); component coverage 100% stmts/funcs/lines, 94.5% branches.
L11: client-only dep; apps/web prod build verified green with the barrel export.

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/ui test (1243 tests, 57 files) + node scripts/pre-ship.mjs [unit-tests]

validation_results.name: Build
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web build (prod, stub env) + node scripts/pre-ship.mjs [build]

notes: Pure UI package (STOA-Domain trivially satisfied — no backend/domain/schema/migration). Built on Tiptap v3.26.1 via context7-verified APIs (useEditor/EditorContent/useEditorState, StarterKit + extension-image, immediatelyRender:false for SSR). Public API documented for PG-181: value/onChange/onSectionsChange/onCreate/editable/ariaLabel/className/promptForLink/promptForImage + exported RICH_TEXT_TOOLBAR_ITEMS. Codex gate fell back to Claude review (codex capped) — real review, 0 findings, PASS. No RED FLAGS. No Co-Authored-By; no --no-verify; no destructive git. CSV test-artifact path reconciled to packages/ui/__tests__/rich-text-editor.test.tsx (repo convention; the vitest include glob). Pre-ship: PASS at the final SHA.
